title: CPU contention causing /cmd_vel topic degradation
description: High CPU utilization on jetson-orin-nav-01 caused the /cmd_vel topic publish rate to drop from 10Hz to 2Hz over a 90-second window. The inference node and navigation stack competed for CPU resources, leading to degraded robot velocity control. The issue self-resolved when the inference workload completed.
root_cause: Concurrent ML inference job consumed excessive CPU, starving the navigation controller of compute resources.
